_comment: Baseline for the NL->Cypher regression gate (WP-25.5). Refresh by running `python -m tests.nl2cypher.eval.runner --config full --baseline` with a live LLM, reviewing the resulting report, and committing this file with an explanation of deltas in the PR. Until a real baseline is captured, the figures below are placeholders tuned to be permissive so the gate passes on first run; replace them before enforcing in CI.
